privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your data is protected in accordance with Cameroon Law No. 2010/012 on cybersecurity and cybercrime, and by analogy with the European GDPR.
privacy.data_body: When you fill in a form, we collect your first name, last name, email, and optionally your phone number, country, city and program of interest.
privacy.use_body: Your data is used only to process your pre-registration, contact you back and inform you about our programs. It is never sold.
privacy.ip_body: Your IP address is never stored in clear text: only its SHA-256 hash is kept for 90 days, for anti-spam and anti-fraud protection.
privacy.rights_body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data at any time through the contact form.
privacy.sharing_body: Your data is accessible only to authorized administrators of the relevant campus. No sharing with unauthorized third parties.
privacy.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us through the contact form.
